string-array.name: health_tips
string-array.item: 💧 Stay hydrated! Drink at least 8 glasses of water daily for better health.
🏃 30 minutes of daily exercise can reduce heart disease risk by 50%.
😴 Quality sleep of 7–8 hours helps your body heal and recover faster.
🍎 An apple a day keeps the doctor away — eat more fruits and vegetables!
🧘 Take 5 minutes to breathe deeply — it reduces stress and lowers blood pressure.
💊 Always take your medicines on time — consistency is key to recovery.
🌞 Get 15 minutes of morning sunlight for natural Vitamin D.
🥗 A balanced diet is the foundation of good health. Include proteins, carbs, and healthy fats.
🚶 Walking 10,000 steps a day improves cardiovascular health and mood.
🧠 Keep your mind active — read, solve puzzles, and learn something new every day.
🦷 Brush twice a day and floss daily for healthy teeth and gums.
🧴 Wash your hands frequently to prevent infections and stay healthy.
🫀 Regular health checkups help detect problems early. Don\'t skip them!
🍵 Green tea is rich in antioxidants — replace one cup of coffee with green tea.
😊 Laugh more! It boosts your immune system and releases feel-good hormones.
